top3.sql:
SELECT 
  c_customer_id
FROM 
  store_sales
  JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
  hd_dep_count = 4
  AND d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
  c_customer_id
HAVING 
  COUNT(DISTINCT ss_store_sk) = 1
  AND COUNT(DISTINCT ss_item_sk) > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  c_customer_id
FROM 
  catalog_sales
  JOIN customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON...

SELECT 
  c_customer_id
FROM 
  store_sales
  JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
  hd_dep_count = 4
  AND d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
  c_customer_id
HAVING 
  COUNT(DISTINCT ss_store_sk) = 1
  AND COUNT(DISTINCT ss_item_sk) > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  c_customer_id
FROM 
  catalog_sales
  JOIN customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON...

WITH channel_customers AS (
  SELECT c_customer_id, 'store' AS channel
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE hd_dep_count = 4 AND d_year = 2001
  GROUP BY c_customer_id, 'store'
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ss_store_sk) = 1 AND COUNT(DISTINCT ss_item_sk) > 0

  UNION

  SELECT c_customer_id, 'catalog' AS channel
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN customer ON ...
